title: Insight
description: 3d floating tooltips/guis that show entity health, dropped items, crop growth, and bed timers
body:
Insight is a information mod that includes 3d tooltips/widgets/GUI's (what ever you want to call them) to the game with multiple features:

**TargetHUD** (With an option for smart positioning, which dynamically positions the HUD for optimal visibility based on your view angle)

TargetHUD helps with entity information, specifically health
![TargetHUD Dynamic positioning showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcec52a79a1b10eadc042af914eb8ad4a8b7e820.gif)

**Dropped Items**

Dropped Items is useful in cases where you dont know what the block is on the ground (maybe a modpack, or a vanilla item that is dark or unrecognizable), its faster than picking it up

![Dropped Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5748f5db7b1e77823b11a5785acd889cd6a59c75.png)

**Bed Timer**

Bed Timer helps you know when night time comes

![Bed Timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa1a92fb74aa88a6e29e822d7b04374c651b9f8c.png)

And more, insight comes with customization, via config tab

if you are on Fabric i highly recommend [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to configure Insight

Insight comes in multiple mod loaders, and (soon) multiple Minecraft versions for universal access

Insight is still in early beta, expect some bugs!
